statement: Compiling an approved OpportunityContract into Build inputs preserves the decided fields as protected product-contract decisions (primaryUser, primaryJob, canonicalWorkflow, dataAuthority, and permissionBoundaries pinned to the nodekit authority; completionCriteria and finalVerdict pinned to the nodeproof authority), turns every prohibited authority into a prohibited:<slug> anti-pattern in the product contract's avoid list, and keeps a read-only wedge read-only; so the Build stage cannot re-decide the user, job, artifact, data authority, or permission boundaries while coding.

surfaces: Decide to Build seam, opportunity compiler, product-design contract
